meaning: adj.垂直的,竖式的,正直的,诚实的,合乎正道的adv.笔直,竖立着n.垂直,竖立
examples: He was handsome, upright, and chivalrous.
Helen sat upright in her chair.
He moved into an upright position.
Guille Franco sent a flick against an upright on the hour as Villarreal provided stubborn resistance.
Jarvis then hit the upright again minutes later when Sale entered the ruck from the side.
